scope: in-stock retail-zone sku title source audit
rules: internal code style title must not be rendered as frontend product title
jd/lenovo direct detail title wins when available and not internal-code-like
url-only direct detail title can be used as title evidence but not as price evidence
inventory parenthetical readable title is allowed only as temporary display title and stays in platform capture queue
